title: Smoke fixture spec — declares the _smoke surfaces live
_comment: FIXTURE, not a real spec. It exists so the declared-live cross-check can be
smoke-tested without a real project. It mirrors the phinma failure shape:
staff-dashboard is declared LIVE but ships on mock data (GATING), exec-view
renders with no backing source, cohort_leaderboard_v is declared but never
queried, and the students table is genuinely wired.
The fixture deliberately exercises all three cross-check paths:
GATING     StaffDashboard.tsx  - declared live + mock seams -> fails the gate
pacing' -> suppressed, must NOT fail despite high-conf seams
FAIL-OPEN  scratch/ExperimentPanel.tsx - declared nowhere -> advisory only
Expected on this tree: 12 high-confidence seams, only 4 of them GATING. The
other 8 are the v1 false-positive class the declared cross-check removes.

applications.name: exec-view
applications.evidence: fixture: renders metrics with no backing source

datastores.name: cohort_leaderboard_v
datastores.evidence: fixture: declared backing view; the dashboard never queries it

contracts.name: GET /api/cohort/{id}/leaderboard
contracts.evidence: fixture: declared but no route file exists — unresolvable by design

integrations.name: Supabase Auth
integrations.evidence: fixture: supabase client is imported by pages/index.tsx

deferred.reason: fixture: out of scope — its 'coming soon' seam must not fail the gate
